events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the staged conductor is undersized for load and run length (voltage drop) — a fail, high risk. NEC Table 310.16 ampacity alone doesn't cover long-run voltage drop, so the fix is to recalculate load and one-way length, resize per 310.16 with adjustment/correction factors, then upsize further as needed to meet the 3%/5% voltage-drop guidance before re-staging and installing.
